benefits.description: Dropped 20 lbs in first month plus one week

side_effects.description: Body felt exhausted and stopped losing weight weeks 5-7, caused by glycogen depletion from insufficient carbohydrate intake

protocol_notes: Started at 245 lbs, dropped to 225 lbs in ~32 days. Experienced glycogen depletion around days 35-49 from low carb intake. Resolved with 3-4 day carb load, regained 2 lbs then lost additional 5 lbs following week. Emphasized importance of electrolytes and sodium.
